statement.en: Chemical shift imaging with chemical gradients: efficient, one-shot analytical methods to determine pH-dependent physical properties of Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint dated 2026-04-25 (future date, likely processing artifact or draft). The axiom describes a novel analytical method combining chemical shift imaging with chemical gradients for API characterization. The core claims (efficiency, one-shot capability, pH-dependent property determination) are testable but not yet peer-validated. The technical feasibility is plausible given existing NMR/MRI foundations, but specific novelty claims require experimental validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: pH空間を一度の共鳴で統合し、薬物の多面体的な化学人格を同時に映す。

visualGlyph.interpretation: pH勾配が薬物分子の核心を螺旋状に照らし、隠れた対称性を一度に露わにする。
